evidence.title: README (segment 2)
evidence.excerpt: An open-source AI financial advisor that learns your situation and gets smarter every conversation.

evidence.title: README (segment 3)
README (segment 5)
evidence.excerpt: Tell Ray about your family, goals, and financial strategy once. From then on, every answer is grounded in your real situation — not generic advice. It connects to your bank, tracks your net worth and spending, and gives you a financial briefing before you type a word. Open source. Local-first. Encrypted.

evidence.title: README (segment 6)
evidence.excerpt: - **Your situation, always loaded** — Every conversation starts with your financial profile: family, income, goals, strategy, key decisions, and open items. Ray reads it all before you type a word. - **Self-updating context** — Got a raise? Had a baby? Decided to pay off debt aggressively? Ray updates your profile automatically when your situation changes. - **Long-term memory** — Mention you're saving for a house or that you cancelled a subscription. Ray remembers across every future conversation.

evidence.title: README (segment 7)
evidence.excerpt: - **CFO personality** — Ray doesn't list options. It tells you what it would do and why, references your goals, and flags problems you haven't noticed yet. - **Daily scoring** — A 0-100 behavior score with streaks and 14 unlockable achievements. No restaurants for a week? That's Kitchen Hero. Five zero-spend days? Monk Mode. - **Budgets and goals** — Track spending limits by category and progress toward financial goals. - **Smart alerts** — Large transactions, low balances, budget overruns.

evidence.title: README (segment 8)
evidence.excerpt: - **Encrypted local database** — All data stays on your machine in an AES-256 encrypted SQLite database. - **PII masking** — Names, account numbers, and identifying details are scrubbed before anything reaches the AI. Your data is analyzed, not exposed.

evidence.title: Add BYOM support via provider-agnostic AI SDK
evidence.excerpt: Add BYOM support via provider-agnostic AI SDK (state:open)

evidence.title: Add Bridge as a BYOK banking provider alongside Plaid
evidence.excerpt: Add Bridge as a BYOK banking provider alongside Plaid (state:open)

evidence.title: v0.3.4
evidence.excerpt: ## What's new - **Line editing in chat** — Cursor movement and line editing support in the interactive chat input. - **Site updates** — New beginner's guide, updated guides index, and various site improvements.

evidence.title: v0.3.3
evidence.excerpt: ## What's new - **Demo mode** — Try Ray with realistic fake data, no bank accounts needed. Run `ray demo` to get started. - **Manual accounts** — Add homes, cars, crypto, and other assets with `ray add`. Includes Redfin home value tracking. - **Institution logos** — Bank logos and brand colors now display in the CLI. - **Expanded Plaid coverage** — Investment transactions, granular liabilities, and institution logo support. - **Persistent context & long-term memory** — Ray remembers your financial goals, strategy, and key decisions across sessions. ## Fixes - Fixed demo mode leaking real financial context - Fixed terminal demo height / layout shift on the site - Deduplicated institution linking
